title: Custom notification formula- notify someone if status has not changed after a few days

posts.author: dunjamar (Dunja M.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m new here but have been using Monday for a while. I have an specific automation I’m trying to build.

Is there a possibility to notify someone if a certain status has not been changed after a few days after it has been set?

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dunjamar - and welcome to the community. I think you could manage this with a set of automations.

The first, when a status is changed to something, push a date by X number of days:

image1282×156 15.3 KB

Then a second automation to notify someone when that status is the same value and the date has passed.

image1303×95 14.6 KB

This may give you the desired effect.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
As mark helped me with a similar problem, I have an addition to this which might help here as well:

Notification when Status stays the same for too long Special workflows & use cases
Thanks again Mark, for your inspiration. I ended up with the following (complex) solution: I added another Date column and created multiple automations: When Status changes to In Review set Due Date to today and push Due Date by 21 Days When Due Date arrives and Status is In Review notify Person By first setting the due date to today I make sure that the notification always occurs in 21 days and pushing the date does not stack. Secondly by connecting the notification to the status, pass…
